```js title=main.js
(() => {
var __webpack_modules__, __rspack_modules = __webpack_modules__ = ({
"../../normalModuleFactory​#afterResolve/duplicate/a.js"(module) {
module.exports = "a";


},
"../../normalModuleFactory​#afterResolve/duplicate/c.js"(module) {
module.exports = "c";


},
"fs"(module) {
"use strict";
module.exports = require("fs");

},

});
// The module cache
var __webpack_module_cache__, __rspack_module_cache = __webpack_module_cache__ = {};

// The require function
function __rspack_require(moduleId) {

// Check if module is in cache
var cachedModule = __rspack_module_cache[moduleId];
if (cachedModule !== undefined) {
return cachedModule.exports;
}
// Create a new module (and put it into the cache)
var module = (__rspack_module_cache[moduleId] = {
exports: {}
});
// Execute the module function
__rspack_modules[moduleId](module, module.exports, __rspack_require);

// Return the exports of the module
return module.exports;

}

var __webpack_require__ = __rspack_require;

// webpack/runtime/compat_get_default_export
(() => {
// getDefaultExport function for compatibility with non-ESM modules
__rspack_require.n = (module) => {
	var getter = module && module.__esModule ?
		() => (module['default']) :
		() => (module);
	__rspack_require.d(getter, { a: getter });
	return getter;
};

})();
// webpack/runtime/define_property_getters
(() => {
__rspack_require.d = (exports, getters, values) => {
	var define = (defs, kind) => {
		for(var key in defs) {
			if(__rspack_require.o(defs, key) && !__rspack_require.o(exports, key)) {
				Object.defineProperty(exports, key, { enumerable: true, [kind]: defs[key] });
			}
		}
	};
	define(getters, "get");
	define(values, "value");
};
})();
// webpack/runtime/has_own_property
(() => {
__rspack_require.o = (obj, prop) => (Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(obj, prop))
})();
// This entry needs to be wrapped in an IIFE because it needs to be in strict mode.
(() => {
"use strict";
/* import */ var _a__rspack_import_0 = __rspack_require("../../normalModuleFactory​#afterResolve/duplicate/a.js");
/* import */ var _a__rspack_import_0_default = /*#__PURE__*/__rspack_require.n(_a__rspack_import_0);
/* import */ var _b__rspack_import_1 = __rspack_require("../../normalModuleFactory​#afterResolve/duplicate/c.js");
/* import */ var _b__rspack_import_1_default = /*#__PURE__*/__rspack_require.n(_b__rspack_import_1);
/* import */ var fs__rspack_import_2 = __rspack_require("fs");
/* import */ var fs__rspack_import_2_default = /*#__PURE__*/__rspack_require.n(fs__rspack_import_2);

 // b.js will be transform to c.js



it("should remove duplicate request modules generate by after resolve hook", () => {
	expect((_a__rspack_import_0_default())).toBe("a");
	expect((_b__rspack_import_1_default())).toBe("c");
	expect((_b__rspack_import_1_default())).toBe("c");
	const ext = ".js";
	expect(fs__rspack_import_2_default().readFileSync(__filename, "utf-8")).not.toContain("duplicate/b" + ext);
	expect(fs__rspack_import_2_default().readFileSync(__filename, "utf-8")).toContain("duplicate/c" + ext);
	expect(
		fs__rspack_import_2_default().readFileSync(__filename, "utf-8").split("duplicate/c" + ext).length - 1
	).toBe(2);
});

})();

})()
;
```
